positive: A minimalist, highly stylized depiction of a cosmic forest at twilight. The scene features elegant, bioluminescent flora and meandering, ancient root systems that glow in shades of sapphire and deep indigo. Central to the composition is a solitary, stylized geometric moonflower emitting a soft, ethereal glow. The style is elegant, clean linework, combining Art Nouveau curvature with modern digital minimalism. The composition should be highly symmetrical, emphasizing clean silhouettes and strong contrast against a dark, velvety background. The overall mood is serene, mysterious, and magical. Suitable for a dark-wear apparel print, utilizing a limited, sophisticated color palette: deep navy, glowing cyan, and muted gold accents. Clean vector art style, flat depth of field, octane render, perfect symmetry.
negative: artifacts, blur, text, watermark, logo, signature, ugly, tiling, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, messy, grayscale, low resolution
